title: Bovines and Buttercups (Mooblooms)
description: A reimagining of Mojang's Moobloom mob.
body:
# Bovines and Buttercups

 

**Bovines and Buttercups** is mod made with the goal of reimagining the **Moobloom** mob as featured in Minecraft Earth and especially in the 2020 Minecraft Mob Vote! # 📋 Main Features - **Thirteen** diverse variants of Mooblooms to discover! - **Nectar** that provides a *unique twist* on potion effects! - Placeable/Consumable **Cupcakes** and **Mushroom Tarts**! - A rewarding collaboration with **Bees**! - **Ranch** structures with varying environments found in different biomes! - Decorate yourself with **Flower Crowns** made from the new Moobloom-exclusive **flowers!** - Extensive Datapack support! # 🐮 Bovines **Mooblooms** have been given a new fresh look in this mod, along with their distant cousins the **Mooshroom!**
*(A Built-In Resource Pack can revert their designs to Mojang's original designs)* You can find the familiar **Buttercup** and **Pink Daisy** Mooblooms spawning naturally in *Flower Forest* biomes! Every other variant can be discovered by breeding Mooblooms within environments that contain *specific blocks.* The new **Ranch** structures will contain appropriate environments for specific Moobloom variants to be born in. These Ranches are biome-dependant as well, so search far and wide to find the ideal conditions for each Moobloom! We have chosen not to implement Vanilla flower Moobloom variants in the mod by default to keep the original philosophy with the original 2020 Moobloom and Moolip introducing new flower types.
🐄 Moobloom Variants and Breeding Environment Requirements ### Alstroemeria - Melon Stem/Melon - Acacia Sapling - Poppy ### Buttercup - Sunflower (Upper Half) - Dandelion or Potted Dandelion - Birch Log, Birch Wood, Birch Sapling or Potted Birch Sapling ### Camellia - Cherry Leaves - Pink Petals - Cherry Log, Cherry Wood, Cherry Sapling or Potted Cherry Saplinjg ### Chargelily - Does not have a breeding combination. - Instead converted from any Moobloom when they are struck by lightning. ### Freesia - Lilypad - Blue Orchid or Potted Blue Orchid - Mangrove Log, Mangrove Wood, Mangrove Propagule or Potted Mangrove Propagule ### Hyacinth - Rose Bush (Upper Half) - Cornflower or Potted Cornflower - Dark Oak Log, Dark Oak Wood, Dark Oak Sapling or Potted Dark Oak Sapling ### Limelight - Cave Vines (Glow Berry Vines) - Big Dripleaf or Small Dripleaf - Flowering Azalea Leaves, Flowering Azalea or Potted Flowering Azalea Bush ### Lingholm - Pumpkin or Pumpkin Stem - Sweet Berry Bush - Spruce Log, Spruce Wood, Spruce Sapling or Potted Spruce Sapling ### Nightshade (1.21.4+) - Open/Closed Eyeblossom or Potted Open/Closed Eyeblossom - Pale Hanging Moss - Pale Oak Log, Pale Oak Wood, Pale Oak Sapling or Potted Pale Oak Sapling ### Pink Daisy - Lilac (Upper Half) - Allium, Potted Allium, Pink Tulip, Potted Pink Tulip or Pink Petals - Oak Log, Oak Wood, Oak Sapling, Potted Oak Sapling, Cherry Log, Cherry Wood, Cherry Sapling, Potted Cherry Sapling, ### Snowdrop - Snow Block - Fern or Potted Fern - Spruce Log, Spruce Wood, Spruce Sapling or Potted Spruce Sapling ### Sombercup - Does not have a breeding combination. - Instead converted from any Moobloom when it is near an activated Sculk Catalyst. ### Tropical Blue - Cocoa - Bamboo, Bamboo Sapling or Potted Bamboo - Jungle Log, Jungle Wood, Jungle Sapling or Potted Jungle Sapling
# 🌻 Buttercups A variety of new decorative flowers are made available with giving Mooblooms bone meal! You may use any combination of these new colourful flowers to create a fashionable **Flower Crown!** These can be any combination of colours depending on the flowers used in the recipe! # 🍲 Nectar & Cupcakes/Tarts A new drinkable item that can be obtained by milking any Moobloom with a bowl just like a Mooshroom! Upon drinking a bowl of **Nectar**, it will cause a **Lockdown** effect which will *pause the timer* or *prevent the affliction* of a specific potion effect depending on which Moobloom variant the Nectar came from! **Nectar** can be used to create placeable **Cupcakes** that also grant the Lockdown effect upon being interacted with! In addition, **Mushroom and Suspicious Stews** can be used to create placeable **Mushroom Tarts**, another new food source that may *grant potion effects* if Suspicious Stew is used as an ingredient! # 🐝 Blossomed Friendship When a **Bee** approaches a Moobloom, the Moobloom will gently lay down and allow the Bee to pollenate its flowers, and when that pollen is taken to a Beehive, the honey produced will become **Rich Honey,** which grants *Saturation* upon consumption! (Alternatively, it will grant more Honeycomb than usual)
